notes: Study is about actin dynamics in NK cell immunological synapses (Current Biology 2018) — completely unrelated to strength training
2022 BJSM meta-analysis of 16 cohort studies; muscle-strengthening 10-17% lower all-cause, CVD, cancer, diabetes mortality; J-shaped dose-response, optimal ~30-60 min/week
2023 PMC review; 21% all-cause mortality reduction from resistance exercise; U-shaped relationship, optimal ~60 min/week; 40% reduction when combined with aerobic exercise
2024 cohort study; any weight training associated with lower all-cause, CVD, cancer mortality in older adults; combined aerobic + weight training lowest mortality risk
